title: The Rules
description: First suburban encounter: enchanted lawn mower, angry mailbox, targeting sprinkler. The HOA memo.

steps.text: The first encounter happened in a cul-de-sac three streets from the strip mall. A riding mower sat in someone's driveway until the party walked past it. Then it sat differently.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The lawn mower is the tank. High defense. Low mobility. The mailbox has ranged attack and paper-cut damage, which sounds minor but—

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: —is not minor. The sprinkler has area control and... it has targeting. Somehow.

steps.text: They won. No one felt good about it.

lines.speaker: Mail Carrier
lines.text: It's been like this for months. Appliances going rogue. Kids disappearing — not missing, just 'relocated.' The HOA says it's 'community restructuring.'
MEMO: Five unregistered residents observed engaging in unauthorized physical altercations with HOA-registered outdoor equipment. This is a CODE VIOLATION.
Failure to report within 24 hours will result in escalating compliance measures. These measures are calibrated to encourage cooperation. — The Coordinator
